description: This file contains React functional components and utility functions related to UI elements such as badges/pills, modals, and formatting helpers for currency, scores, and risk tiers. The components include Pill and Modal, and utility functions include formatMoney, formatScore, and riskTier.

methods.name: Pill({ variant = "default", children })
methods.description: A simple badge/pill component with variants (default, primary, warn, danger).

methods.name: Modal({ title, isOpen, onClose, children, footer })
methods.description: A modal/dialog component with ESC to close and click-outside close functionality.

methods.name: formatMoney
methods.description: Formats numerical amounts into currency strings, defaulting to USD.

methods.name: formatScore
methods.description: Formats a score (0..1 or 0..100) into a percentage label.

methods.name: riskTier
methods.description: Determines risk tier label and variant based on a numeric score.

ctags.name: Modal
ctags.pattern: /^export function Modal({ title, isOpen, onClose, children, footer }) {$/
